name: reinforced-attention
content:
## Introduction

Standard attention is fixed; reinforced attention learns to adjust weights based on task-specific rewards, improving model focus. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Standard attention is fixed; reinforced attention learns to adjust weights based on task-specific rewards, improving model focus.

